zh.lifeSummary: 當John Maxwell於1450年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可時，他的父親John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell20歲，母親Janet Crichton16歲。他於1490年2月15日與Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1513年9月9日在英國諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年63歲。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Maxwell was born in 1450, in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell, was 20 and his mother, Janet Crichton, was 16. He married Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell on 15 February 1490. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 9 September 1513, in Branxton, Northumberland, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Maxwell est né en 1450, à Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Janet Crichton, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell le 15 février 1490. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1513, à Branxton, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Maxwell 1450 in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell 20 und seine Mutter Janet Crichton 16. Er hat am 15. Februar 1490 Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 9. September 1513 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Branxton, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Maxwell è nato il nel 1450 nel Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Janet Crichton, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell il 15 febbraio 1490. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 9 settembre 1513, nel Branxton, Northumberland, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Maxwellが1450年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアケエルラバーオックで生まれた時，父John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwellは20歳，母Janet Crichtonは16歳であった。1490年2月15日にAgnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1513年9月9日にイギリスノースウンバーランドブランクストンで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Maxwell(이)가 1450년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 카이를레이베록에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Crichton(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1490년 2월 15일 Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년 9월 9일 영국 노르스벌랜드 브랜스턴에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Maxwell nasceu em 1450, em Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Janet Crichton, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell em 15 de fevereiro de 1490. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1513, em Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Maxwell родился в 1450 г. в местности каирлавирокк, думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Crichton, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell 15 февраля 1490 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 9 сентября 1513 г. в местности бранкстон, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Maxwell nació en 1450, en Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, John Maxwell - Master Of Maxwell, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Janet Crichton, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Agnes Stewart , Countess of Bothwell el 15 de febrero de 1490. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1513, en Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
